jobs.name: Voice Bridge
jobs.next_action: Create Matrix voice message handler: extend OpenClaw Matrix provider to receive voice messages, transcribe with local Whisper, and respond with audio clips using TTS (Kokoro or Piper). Focus on core voice-in/voice-out loop with minimal latency.

Phase 1 complete: Core voice-in/voice-out modules created. Next: Test actual transcription with audio file, test TTS synthesis, create integration example, and document usage. Create .env file and test with actual Matrix credentials if available.
